settingsManagementPage.name: settingsManagementLivioPage
settingsManagementPage.description: React + TypeScript settings CRUD management page — single-component pattern with 6 sections: header (title + Add button) · filter bar (Input.Search + SelectFilter status) · table (TablePaging with header-level bulk Switch + row-level Switch, ColumnsType<T>[]) · create/edit modal (AntD Form with date-range validator, TextArea, Checkbox isActive) · delete confirm modal · bulk-update confirm modal. Replace every @@REPLACE@@ (PascalCase) and @@replace@@ (camelCase) with entity name.
slots: header (page title h3 + Button Add with PlusOutlined)
table (TablePaging · header Switch for bulk activate/deactivate → confirmation modal · row Switch per record · Edit+Delete action buttons)
create/edit modal (Form layout=vertical: name · startDate · endDate with isBefore validator · description TextArea · isActive Checkbox)
delete confirm modal (dangerouslySetInnerHTML warning + okButtonProps color=red)
bulk-update confirm modal (triggered by header Switch change)
settingsManagementPage.hint: 1) Find-replace @@REPLACE@@ with PascalCase entity name (e.g. ConstructionGrade). 2) Find-replace @@replace@@ with camelCase entity name (e.g. constructionGrade). 3) Update columns array with entity-specific fields. 4) Update Form.Item fields inside create/edit modal to match domain model. 5) Add i18n keys for the new entity (see i18nKeys list). 6) Create @@replace@@.use-case.ts and @@replace@@ model types. 7) Register the page route in PAGE_URL and App.tsx.

columnSchema.name: ColumnType<T>
columnSchema.description: Ant Design ColumnsType<T> column definition passed to TablePaging. The isActive and action columns are required by this template; add entity-specific columns between them.

title.description: Column header text or JSX element. The isActive column uses a <div> with a bulk Switch + label.

dataIndex.description: Key mapping to a field on the record type T.

key.description: Unique identifier for the column; usually matches dataIndex.

width.description: Column width in pixels. Recommended: 150 for short text, 200 for medium, 100 for action column.

render.description: Custom cell renderer. Used for date formatting (getDateTime), Switch toggle, and action buttons.

sorter.description: Comparator for client-side sort. Example: (a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name).

ellipsis.description: Truncate overflowing text and show tooltip. Use for description/basis columns.

isActive.description: Always present. Header contains a bulk Switch (handleHeaderSwitchChange + isAllActive checked). Cell renders a row-level Switch (onChangeSwitch).

action.description: Always present as last column. Renders EditOutlined (opens create/edit modal with form.setFieldsValue) and DeleteOutlined (opens delete confirm modal) buttons.
